Video.summary: Duane begs Chuck to come back when a gasoline shortage happens in Yellowknife.
Video.title: Big Boost

Video.summary: Adam and Duane are forced to work things out on a flight to Alert, Earth's northernmost settlement.
Video.title: Top of the World

Video.summary: Joe finds out that Gord has taken a job with a rival airline; Larry makes a near fatal error.
Video.title: Last Days

Video.summary: Trying to make his mark at Buffalo, Duane lands two more Electra contracts.
Video.title: Push Comes to Shove

Video.summary: The completion of a major contract is in jeopardy when Duane leaves the crew to spend time at home.
Video.title: The Doghouse

Video.summary: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine.
Video.title: Expect the Unexpected

Video.summary: Rookie Scott gets a taste of the action when Buffalo responds to an emergency in Alberta.
Video.title: Coming Home

Video.summary: Joe performs stunt landings for a film crew; new employee Ryan tries to prove his worth.
Video.title: Dark Skies

Video.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Stephen Harper visits Buffalo Airways; Joe clashes with inspectors.
Video.title: Shut Down

Video.summary: Tyler performs stunts for a visiting film crew; Andrew decides to work for a larger airline.
Video.title: A Tale of Two Pilots

Video.summary: Breakdowns threaten the company's Christmas toy run to the Arctic.
Video.title: A Very Buffalo Christmas

Video.summary: Ray must perform an emergency landing when the right landing gear of his plane becomes stuck.
Video.title: Crash Landing

Video.summary: Mechanic Cory works to ready a water bomber for prospective South Korean buyers.
Video.title: For Sale By Owner

Video.summary: Justin and Cory attempt to put a CL-215 aircraft onto a cargo ship for delivery to a Korean company.
Video.title: Over Seas

Video.summary: Brian tackles a dangerous job; remembering former Buffalo Airways pilot Arnie Schreder.
Video.title: Meltdown

Video.summary: Justin and Cory land at a dangerous airstrip; LEGOLAND in Denmark hosts a Buffalo Airways event.
Video.title: North Atlantic Convoy

Video.summary: Joe and Mikey recover a lost tailpiece from a plane wreck; Cory and Justin encounter severe icing.
Video.title: Sunk

Video.summary: Iron Maiden lead singer Bruce Dickinson pilots Buffalo's planes; Mikey flies in a CF-18 fighter jet.
Video.title: Turkey or Bust

Video.summary: David and Jeff deal with a troublesome landing-gear light; Buffalo's hockey team plays NHL stars.
Video.title: Shootout

Video.summary: Al has a mishap on the runway; the boys are stuck in Turkey with a water bomber.
Video.title: Snowplane

Video.summary: Devan encounters gear difficulties when he transports a DC-3; frigid weather creates problems.
Video.title: Gear Lock

Video.summary: Duane lands a huge contract.
Video.title: Power Struggle

Video.summary: Joe assists Alex Debogorski of "Ice Road Truckers"; Scott takes a tumble on the icy tarmac.
Video.title: Ice Jam

Video.summary: Corey and Justin attempt to remove their plane off the ship and deliver it to its final destination.
Video.title: Water Wings

Video.summary: The team contends with a landing-gear collapse and a frozen DC-4 that cannot get airborne.
Video.title: Cold Start

Video.summary: Engine troubles on the C-46 during the valley run force Devan to shut down an engine.
Video.title: Ice Strip
